downgradeReason: Attempt A requires 2-peer lockstep via Docker containers. The multiplayer transport uses BroadcastChannel (browser same-origin API), which cannot communicate across separate Docker container Chromium instances. No shared WebSocket server exists in the headless test infrastructure. Downgraded to Attempt B: single-peer seed determinism via Vitest unit tests (9 tests) plus programmatic source auditing.
